message:
refactor(session): reduce clone allocations in parent-chain tree walks

Replace Option::take + clone pattern with Option::as_ref + clone_from
in the two parent-chain walk loops (entries_for_current_path and
path_preview_and_message_count). The previous code used `while let
Some(id) = current` which consumed the Option on each iteration and
required `current = entry.base().parent_id.clone()` to produce a new
owned String. The new pattern uses `while let Some(id) = current.as_ref()`
and `current.clone_from(&entry.base().parent_id)` which reuses the
existing String allocation when the new value fits, avoiding a
per-iteration heap allocation for the common case of similar-length IDs.

Flip the conditional in list_leaves() from `if !has_children { Some }
else { None }` to `if has_children { None } else { Some }` for
positive-condition-first style consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
